debugConsoleLogging.hint: When enabled, writes diagnostic information to the browser console for troubleshooting. No chat or UI messages are created.
debugConsoleLogging.name: Debug Console Logging

enableCriticalReplacement.hint: When enabled, WFRP critical rolls can use expanded critical tables. Source items without a configured or inferred damage type use the normal WFRP tables.
enableCriticalReplacement.name: Replace WFRP Critical Tables

enableNaturalOneCriticals.hint: When enabled, successful natural 1 rolls count as criticals alongside WFRP's normal doubles rule.
enableNaturalOneCriticals.name: Criticals on Successful Natural 1s

inferDamageFromWeaponProperties.hint: When enabled, source items without a Damage Type property can infer a table category from WFRP item properties such as Hack, Impale, Pummel, or Slash.
inferDamageFromWeaponProperties.name: Infer Damage Type From Item Properties

inferDamageFromWeaponTypes.hint: When enabled, source items without a Damage Type property or matching item property can infer a table category from their weapon group or type. This is convenient but less reliable.
inferDamageFromWeaponTypes.name: Infer Damage Type From Weapon Type

weaponPropertyDamageMapping.hint: JSON map from WFRP item property keys or labels to expanded critical table categories, or none to explicitly ignore a property. Valid categories: arrowsBolts, bullets, crushing, cutting, flameEnergy, piercing, shrapnelShot, sling, teethClaws, unarmed, none.
weaponPropertyDamageMapping.name: Item Property Damage Type Mapping

weaponTypeDamageMapping.hint: JSON map from WFRP weapon group or type keys to expanded critical table categories, or none to explicitly ignore a weapon type. Valid categories: arrowsBolts, bullets, crushing, cutting, flameEnergy, piercing, shrapnelShot, sling, teethClaws, unarmed, none.
weaponTypeDamageMapping.name: Weapon Type Damage Type Mapping
